hud.title: Vessel operation — live terminal
hud.subtitle: Instructor evaluation streams live · no operator data entry

groupModeRequired.label: [ GROUP MODE REQUIRED ]
groupModeRequired.body: Select Group as the training type above for the live operation HUD. Ship operation evaluations from the instructor panel only flow to this screen in a group session.

groupMembership.label: [ GROUP MEMBERSHIP ]
groupMembership.body: You must belong to a tactical group for live evaluation.

observationNotes.title: Observation notes
observationNotes.empty: No observation notes yet — they appear here when the instructor logs a record.
observationNotes.noNoteForPhase: No note entered for this phase.

pdfPanel.description: Download the blank observation form. Have a peer mark your performance phase by phase; after filling signature and score boxes, transfer results via the Enter record tab.

pdfBanner.hint: Download the form, have a peer observe you, then enter the markings below.

registry.empty: No observed VBSS records yet — download the PDF form and enter a record.

hud.title: Tactical medical evaluation — live terminal
hud.subtitle: Instructor MARCH scores and critical errors stream live · no operator data entry

groupModeRequired.label: [ GROUP MODE REQUIRED ]
groupModeRequired.body: Select Group as the training type above for the live MARCH HUD. Instructor evaluation only flows to this screen in a group session.

groupMembership.label: [ GROUP MEMBERSHIP ]
groupMembership.body: You must belong to a tactical group for live evaluation.

observationNotes.title: Observation notes
observationNotes.empty: No observation notes yet — they appear here when the instructor logs a record.
observationNotes.noNoteForPhase: No note entered for this phase.

pdfPanel.description: Download the MARCH protocol observation form. Have the observer mark M/A/R/C/H phases, critical error (KIA), and intervention chips; then create the digital record via the Enter record tab.

pdfBanner.hint: Download the form, have the observer mark MARCH phases, then enter results here.

registry.empty: No observed TCCC records yet — download the PDF form and enter a record.

form.operationNotePlaceholder: Learning outcomes, KPIs, coach notes, range safety…
